text:
is the term used by Gehirn for the project to create the Evangelion Units. Alongside the Human Instrumentality Project and the Adam Project, this is one of the three major projects being carried out by NERV, and is also known as the "Adam Revival Project". This was the first of these to be started, and is presumed to be a plan to create a clone of the first Angel named Adam. The Evangelions were constructed through this project. Evangelion Chronicle 02 p.24
